title: cyperus niger
intro: Cyperus niger, also known as black sedge or purple papyrus, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus niger include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Cyperus niger include tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments.
